plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-311 RP09.P06.M04.S06-RP09.P06.M06.S03 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-311 implements descriptor-only coverage of the RP09.P06.M04 secondary workflow permission tail (15 rows), the full M05 permission/audit binding cycle (22 rows including cross-tenant and leak prevention tests), and the M06 synthetic fixture head (3 rows) across three sections over 40 planned rows with a pack-local row-extras constant, Hermes evidence (H09), Claude review packet (C09), and CP00-312 handoff, without opening runtime permission evaluation, audit event writes, AI runtime dispatch, test runtime paths, state writes, object storage, command runtime execution, Hermes runtime receipts, Citation Ledger, or Loop behavior.

parsed_review.summary: CP00-311 is a clean, descriptor-only CRM-core permission-slice pack covering RP09.P06.M04.S06-RP09.P06.M06.S03 (40 units). The pack-level claim (production_ready:false, status implemented_pending_review, flag crm_core_permission_slice_descriptor_verified) is conservative and fully supported by implementation, tests, and local/Hermes validation. Unit/deliverable/micro counts reconcile across registry (CRM_CORE_CP311_REQUIREMENTS), baseline, manifest, and contract: M04=15, M05=22, M06=3 = 40; deliverables 14 impl / 10 security_audit / 8 ui / 2 claude_review / 6 test = 40. All 7 required public exports exist in service.js/validators.js and are surfaced via index.js wildcard re-export, and are imported+asserted in test/model.test.js. No-write/no-real-data boundaries are enforced structurally by freezeCp311Result and freezeCp311Validation (synthetic_only, no_real_data, writes_product_state:false, evaluates_runtime_permission:false, writes_audit_event:false, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false) plus CRM_CORE_CP311_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION. Per-row guards (deny_over_allow_enforced, permission_decision_detail_included:false, dispatches_ai_runtime:false, real_client_data_loaded:false, cross_tenant_access_allowed:false, leak_detected:false) are inherited from the CP310 row-extras and checked by validateCrmCoreCp311PermissionSliceDescriptor. Authority boundary holds: Claude is read-only (tools Read/Grep/Glob, permission_mode read_only), claude_is_final_approval:false, and enterprise trust is not claimed from local validation; the Hermes H09 pattern is used only for a deterministic evidence packet/receipt (receipt_shape descriptor_only…no_write), not product runtime. CP178+ review-hardening rejection set is correctly encoded in forbidden_review_evidence (failed_authentication_run, zero_byte_output, malformed_json_output, fenced_json_output, tool_call_shaped_output, missing references, final-approval/enterprise-trust claims), and the readiness auth-preflight passed with valid JSON. The unrelated ldip-integration invalid-attempt file and the docx are correctly classified as unrelated dirty files, not part of this pack. No P0/P1/P2 issues found; one P3 informational note on expected post-review artifact sequencing. This review is independent input only and is not final approval — human final approval remains required and is closed outside this receipt.

findings.title: Post-review evidence artifacts referenced but not yet present (expected pre-closeout sequencing)
findings.details: manifest.json evidence_refs/required_pack_artifacts list docs/closeout-packs/cp00-311/claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json, but only manifest.json and command-evidence.json currently exist in the pack directory. This is the correct pre-closeout state: those artifacts are produced by the downstream hardening steps (read_only_claude_run_raw_capture -> normalize -> receipt_validate -> finding_adjudication -> construction_inspection -> final_closeout_validation), and command-evidence.json note[3] correctly defers npm run closeout-pack:validate and git diff --check --cached to post-review. pack_level_claude_review.status is 'pending' with empty valid_review_receipts, consistent with this being the review run that generates that input. Not a defect in the pack implementation.
findings.recommendation: Proceed through the remaining hardening sequence: normalize this review into review-receipt.json, run finding adjudication and construction inspection, then final_closeout_validation (closeout-pack:validate, git diff --check --cached) before commit. Ensure exactly one valid pack review receipt is recorded and that production_ready/status flip only after the full gate chain plus human final approval.
findings.post_review_disposition: Informational only; no code change required. Confirmed the artifact gating and hardening sequence are correctly ordered.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-311 crm core permission slice descriptor pack
